# @byted-service/singleflight

Cache the promise returned by the specified function and wait for the promise to return the result. There is only one promise for the same key that is waiting to return the result.

## Installation

```sh
npm install @byted-service/singleflight --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## Instructions

```ts
import Singleflight from '@byted-service/singleflight';
import { assert } from 'console';

const returnPromiseResolve = (ms: number, res: number) => {
    return new Promise<typeof res>(resolve => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            resolve(res);
        }, ms);
    });
};

const sf = new Singleflight<number>();

const res = await Promise.all([
    sf.do('key', () => {
        return returnPromiseResolve(10, 10);
    }),
    sf.do('key', () => {
        return returnPromiseResolve(10, 15);
    })
]);

console.log(res[0], res[1]);

assert(res[0] === res[1], 'invoke do error');
```

## API

### Singleflight\<T\>(options:{ timeout?: number; checkInterval?: number; prefix?: string;}={})

-   `options`
    -   `cacheOptions` [optional] Refer to https://github.com/isaacs/node-lru-cache#options

### do(key:string,fn:()=>Promise\<T\>,options:{timeout?:number;}={}):Promise\<T\>

-   `key` used for caching
-   `fn` returns the promise that needs to be cached.
